title: Fiery Italian Almond Panforte
description: A peppery and crunchy Italian dessert featuring blue food coloring, grilled on a salt block, this panforte is an adventurous treat for the senses
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat and season the salt block with a small amount of oil
In a large bowl, whisk together the honey, blue food coloring, and ground peppercorns until well combined
Add the sliced almonds, candied citron, and candied orange peel to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the honey mixture
Press the mixture into a round shape on the prepared salt block
Grill the panforte for 5 minutes on each side, or until it is lightly browned and crispy
Remove the panforte from the grill and let it cool completely on the salt block
Once the panforte is cool, dust it with confectioners sugar and sprinkle with salt
Cut the panforte into wedges and serve immediately
